meta.title: TNP — The Network Protocol
meta.description: Your internet. Your rules. Register domains on The Network Protocol — outside ICANN, linked to your Oxy identity.

heroDescription: Register domains on an alternative internet namespace. Explore TLDs, manage DNS records, and claim your space on TNP.

explore.title: Explore TLDs
explore.desc: Browse available TLDs and recently registered domains.

register.title: Register a Domain
register.desc: Claim your name on .ox, .app, .com, or any active TLD.

propose.title: Propose a TLD
propose.desc: Suggest a new TLD and let the community vote on it.

install.title: Install TNP
install.desc: One command to resolve TNP domains on your device.
